evals.prompt: Create a new entity called Redemption for the nav-engine-v2 project. It should track fund redemption requests from investors, support processing, completion, cancellation, failure states, and require HMAC signature validation. Include the repository interface with fluent query builders, the service with proper params validation, and the Wire injection setup.
evals.expected_output: Complete scaffolding with: 1) Entity composing BaseEntitySF + Processable + Completable + Cancelable + Failable + Signable traits, 2) Repository with fluent For* methods and defer clean(), 3) Service with triple return (result, error, []ParamError), 4) Params struct implementing IsMandatoryFilled/MandatorySchema/MandatoryErrors, 5) Wire injection function

assertions.text: Entity embeds BaseEntitySF (snowflake ID)
Entity embeds Processable trait
Entity embeds Completable trait
Entity embeds Cancelable trait
Entity embeds Failable trait
Entity embeds Signable trait
Entity does NOT define TableName() method (GORM auto-derives)
Repository interface has fluent For* methods returning self
Repository execution methods have defer r.clean()
Repository has buildQuery() helper
Service methods return (result, error, []ParamError) triple
Service has defer helpers.LogAndCatchPanic()
Params struct implements IsMandatoryFilled() bool
Params struct implements MandatoryErrors() []ParamError
Wire function uses wire.Build with correct dependency chain
Boolean fields use int type in Go with tinyint(1) GORM tag, not bool
Sign GetSignData uses StringFixed(4) for decimals and Unix() for timestamps

evals.expected_output: Review identifying: 1) Wrong return signature — should be triple return, 2) float64 for money — must use decimal.Decimal, 3) Missing Params interface — no input validation, 4) Missing defer helpers.LogAndCatchPanic(), 5) Fee should be negative (sign convention), 6) Missing SyncProcessedDate() call, 7) No transaction management for state change, 8) Missing defer r.clean() concern

assertions.text: Flags missing triple return (result, error, []ParamError)
Flags float64 for monetary value — must use decimal.Decimal
Flags missing Params interface for input validation
Flags missing defer helpers.LogAndCatchPanic()
Flags fee sign convention — must be stored as negative
Flags missing SyncProcessedDate() trait call
Flags missing transaction for state transition
Provides corrected code example

evals.prompt: I'm adding a new scheduled job to nav-engine-v2 that runs every hour to check for stale transactions that have been in 'processing' status for more than 24 hours and mark them as failed. Walk me through the full implementation.
evals.expected_output: Implementation covering: 1) Add Scheduler record to DB, 2) Create job handler function, 3) Register in job registry, 4) Service method with triple return, 5) CronLocker usage, 6) Repository query with ForStatus + date filter, 7) State transition via Fail() with SyncFailedDate()

assertions.text: Creates Scheduler database record with cron expression
Job handler uses Wire service-only injection
Registers job code in the jobRegistry map
Uses CronLocker (Redis SetNX) for distributed locking
Service method has triple return pattern
Repository uses ForStatus("processing") fluent filter
Calls SyncFailedDate() on the Failable trait
Uses transaction for batch state transitions
Mentions 15-second hot reload for new jobs
